---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem:**
What problem does this solve?

**Proposed solution:**
How should it work?

**Alternatives considered:**
What else did you think about?

**Impact:**
Which tier does this affect? (MVP / V1 / V2 / docs / community)

**Would you build it?**
Are you willing to contribute this, or is this a request for someone else?
